name: flow
description: Flow agentic workflow plugin with the flow-run skill for end-to-end task execution.

interface.longDescription: Provides the flow-run skill to execute BRANCH -> SELECT -> PLAN -> EXECUTE -> ARCHIVE -> REVIEW -> FOLLOW-UP -> ARCHIVE-REVIEW with quality gates.
defaultPrompt: Run the next task end-to-end using $flow-run.
Execute FLOW from BRANCH through ARCHIVE-REVIEW.
